title: Count Number of Pairs With Absolute Difference K
titleCn: 差的绝对值为 K 的数对数目

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,2,1], k = 1 Output: 4 Explanation: The pairs with an absolute difference of 1 are: - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1]
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The pairs with an absolute difference of 1 are: - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1] - [1,2,2,1]

testcases.input: nums = [1,3], k = 3 Output: 0 Explanation: There are no pairs with an absolute difference of 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no pairs with an absolute difference of 3.

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1,5,4], k = 2 Output: 3 Explanation: The pairs with an absolute difference of 2 are: - [3,2,1,5,4] - [3,2,1,5,4] - [3,2,1,5,4]
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The pairs with an absolute difference of 2 are: - [3,2,1,5,4] - [3,2,1,5,4] - [3,2,1,5,4]
